title: elaeagnus angustifolia subsp. orientalis
intro: Elaeagnus angustifolia subsp. orientalis, also known as the silverberry or wolf willow, is a shrub native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Elaeagnus angustifolia subsp. orientalis include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antiviral properties. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
